sentences.english: I really want to see the pyramids in Egypt.
They've been on my bucket list since I was a kid.
I want to take the Trans-Siberian Railway across Russia, even though it takes a whole week.
sentences.korean: 시베리아 횡단 열차를 타고 러시아를 횡단하고 싶어요. 일주일이나 걸리지만요.

sentences.english: I dream of visiting Machu Picchu, and I've been saving money for the trip for two years.
sentences.korean: 마추픽추 방문을 꿈꿔요. 여행을 위해 2년간 돈을 모으고 있어요.
